# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-slim

# Create a non-root user for running the application
RUN groupadd --gid 1001 appgroup && \
    useradd --uid 1001 --gid appgroup --shell /bin/bash --create-home appuser

# Update package lists
RUN apt-get update

# Install build essentials for native Node.js modules
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential

# Install Python (required by some Node.js native modules like node-gyp)
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3

# Install Git for pulling dependencies from repositories
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git

# Install curl for health checks and API testing
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl

# Install wget as an alternative download utility
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget

# Install OpenSSL for TLS/SSL support
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends openssl

# Install ca-certificates for secure HTTPS connections
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates

# Install dnsutils for network debugging
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends dnsutils

# Install procps for process monitoring (ps, top, etc.)
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends procps

# Install net-tools for network diagnostics
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends net-tools

# Install jq for JSON processing in scripts
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends jq

# Install tini as a proper init system to handle signals correctly
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends tini

# Clean up apt cache to reduce image size
RUN apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/* /var/tmp/*

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /home/appuser/app

# Copy package files first for better Docker layer caching
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup package.json package-lock.json* ./

# Install Node.js dependencies
RUN npm ci --omit=dev && npm cache clean --force

# Copy application source code
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup . .

# Remove unnecessary files that shouldn't be in the container
RUN rm -f .env .env.local .dockerignore Dockerfile

# Set secure file permissions
RUN chmod -R 755 /home/appuser/app && \
    find /home/appuser/app -type f -name "*.js" -exec chmod 644 {} \;

# Drop privileges - switch to non-root user
USER appuser

# Disable npm update notifier and telemetry
ENV NPM_CONFIG_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=false \
    NODE_ENV=production \
    NPM_CONFIG_FUND=false

# Expose the application port (non-privileged port)
EXPOSE 3000

# Add health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=15s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1

# Use tini as entrypoint for proper signal handling and zombie process reaping
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/tini", "--"]

# Start the application
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
